query:
-- Step 1: Add totalCost column to revenue_groups if not exists
ALTER TABLE revenue_groups ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS totalCost DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00;

-- Step 2: Create Data Bundle revenue groups (fix GROUP BY to include customerName)
INSERT INTO revenue_groups (groupId, name, type, customerExternalId, customerName, totalRevenue, autoDetected)
SELECT
  CONCAT('data-', s.customerExternalId, '-', CAST(s.monthlyRevenue AS CHAR)) AS groupId,
  'Data - Internet' AS name,
  'data_bundle' AS type,
  s.customerExternalId,
  MIN(s.customerName) AS customerName,
  s.monthlyRevenue AS totalRevenue,
  1 AS autoDetected
FROM services s
WHERE
  s.monthlyRevenue > 0
  AND (s.revenueGroupId IS NULL OR s.revenueGroupId = '')
  AND s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND s.customerExternalId != ''
  AND (
    s.serviceType = 'Internet'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%NBN%'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%Broadband%'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%Fibre%'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%Internet%'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%Data%'
  )
GROUP BY s.customerExternalId, s.monthlyRevenue
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = name;

-- Step 3: Tag services with their Data Bundle groupId
UPDATE services s
INNER JOIN revenue_groups rg ON rg.type = 'data_bundle'
  AND rg.customerExternalId = s.customerExternalId
  AND rg.totalRevenue = s.monthlyRevenue
SET s.revenueGroupId = rg.groupId, s.revenueGroupLabel = 'Data - Internet'
WHERE
  (s.revenueGroupId IS NULL OR s.revenueGroupId = '')
  AND (
    s.serviceType = 'Internet'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%NBN%'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%Broadband%'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%Fibre%'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%Internet%'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%Data%'
  );

-- Step 4: Compute groupTotalCost for ALL revenue groups
UPDATE revenue_groups rg
JOIN (
  SELECT revenueGroupId, SUM(monthlyCost) AS totalCost
  FROM services
  WHERE revenueGroupId IS NOT NULL AND revenueGroupId != ''
  GROUP BY revenueGroupId
) costs ON rg.groupId = costs.revenueGroupId
SET rg.totalCost = costs.totalCost;

-- Step 5: Verify
SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS groupCount,
  SUM(totalRevenue) AS totalRev,
  SUM(totalCost) AS totalCost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN totalCost > totalRevenue THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lossGroups
FROM revenue_groups
GROUP BY type;
